overview:
## Discussion

Optionally set the value to a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] indicating a specific message size when the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingKey] attribute is set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingOAEPKey]. If you don’t set this attribute, the minimum padding is used by default.

This attribute is ignored when padding is not set to OAEP.

# kSecOAEPMessageLengthAttributeName

**Global Variable**

The OAEP message length.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecOAEPMessageLengthAttributeName: CFString
```

## Discussion

Optionally set the value to a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] indicating a specific message size when the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingKey] attribute is set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingOAEPKey]. If you don’t set this attribute, the minimum padding is used by default.

This attribute is ignored when padding is not set to OAEP.
title: kSecOAEPMessageLengthAttributeName
